title: Cheaper Smithing
description: Replaces the crafting recipes for smithing templates with cheaper, balanced ones.
body:
This datapack changes the recipes for all smithing templates to make them easier to obtain while aiming for balance. All armour trim recipes follow the same basic pattern, the only difference being the main material (cobblestone, cobbled deepslate, prismarine etc.).

<details>
<summary>Permissions</summary>
  
You may:
- Modify this pack for personal use
- Include this project in modpacks uploaded to Modrinth

You may not:
- Reupload or redistribute this pack or any assets from this page in ANY form

</details>

<details>
<summary>About Updates</summary>

I usually only test pack updates on the latest version of Minecraft. Data packs are sometimes backwards and forwards compatible. If you experience any issues or if the pack doesn't work, please report it to me.

</details>

If you have a feature request, feel free to create an issue on my issue tracker
